# Committee Members {.unnumbered}

| Name | Affiliation |
|---|---|
| John Pan (Chair) | Industrial and Manufacturing Engineering, CENG |
| Anelise Sabbag | Statistics, COSAM |
| Shantanu Kumar | Construction Management, CAED |
| Laura Cacciamani | Psychology and Child Development, CLA |
| Eduardo Zambrano | Economics, OCOB |
| Jermaine Washington | Architecture, CAED (Lecturer) |
| Carrie A. Langner | Psychology and Child Development, CLA (Department Head) |
| Jett Palmer | Student Representative (ASI) |
| Silvia Marijuan | World Languages and Cultures, CLA (CFA) |
| Kylie Parrotta | Social Sciences, CLA (Faculty Affairs Committee) |
| James Bingaman | Agricultural Education and Communication, CAFES (Instruction Committee) |
| Simone Aloisio | Academic Personnel (ex officio, non-voting) |
| Jean Lee | Academic Programs and Planning (Faculty Director) |
| Patrick O'Sullivan | Center for Teaching, Learning and Technology (ex officio) |
